name: Bzikebi
description: '''Bzikebi''' ({{lang-ka|ბზიკები}}, {{literally|Wasps}}) is a Georgian musical group, best known for winning the [[Junior Eurovision Song Contest 2008]] for Georgia with the song [[Bzz..|''Bzz''..]]. The group consists of Giorgi Shiolashvili ({{lang|ka|გიორგი შიოლაშვილი}}, born {{birth date|1998|3|7|df=yes}}), Mariam Kikuashvili ({{lang|ka|მარიამ კიკუაშვილი}}, born {{birth date|1998|1|22|df=yes}}), and Mariam Tatulashvili ({{lang|ka|მარიამ თათულაშვილი}}, born {{birth date|1998|4|5|df=yes}}), who were all ten years old during the contest. They represented {{Esccnty|Georgia|y=2026}} in the [[Eurovision Song Contest 2026]] with the song "On Replay".
